code:
import io
import string

let t = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let body = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(body)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
mut current = ""
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(body, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 12 or b == 11
    if current == t
      count = count + 1
    end
    current = ""
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if current == t
  count = count + 1
end
println("count=#{count}")
